webhook_secret_ref.description: Secret reference that resolves to the full Discord webhook URL.

timeout_seconds.description: Request timeout used for Discord webhook send requests.

public_key_ref.description: Reference to the Discord application public key for standalone receive tests.

public_key.description: Resolved Discord application public key injected by the host for real ingress.

response_text.description: Minimal response text returned for supported application commands.

timestamp_tolerance_seconds.description: Accepted freshness window for Discord signature timestamps.

guild_allowlist.description: Optional guild allowlist for Discord interactions.

channel_allowlist.description: Optional channel allowlist for Discord interactions.
